name: Rope Spinning
preceding_figure_names: Alemena, Continuous Hip Twists, Hand To Hand LSP, Natural Top, Rope Spinning, Three Alemanas
following_figure_names: Hand To Hand RSP, Basic Movements: Closed, Basic Movements: Open, Fan, Opening Out To Right And Left, Side Step To Left, Side Step To Right, Cuban Rock LF, Syncopated Cuban Rock LF, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn To R, Underarm Turn To L, Natural Opening Out Movement, Closed Hip Twist, Spiral, Rope Spinning, Advanced Hip Twists, Continuous Hip Twists, Circular Hip Twists, Progressive Walks Forward in Right Shadow Position
notes:
Alternative finishing positions:
Man and Lady end to side
Man and lady end diagonally fwd in Open CPP
Man 1/8 R on step 6.
Lady 7/8 to R over step 1 to 6.
Lady end fwd toward Man's R side
Man turns body slightly R on step 6 to lead Lady towards his R side.
Lady LF fwd in line with RF.
Man and Lady fwd towards partner's R side
Man RF fwd in line with LF towards Lady's R side.
Lady LF fwd in line with RF
R Shadow Position
Man RF fwd in line with LF towards Lady's R side, and continues to turn her R.
Lady ends LF back having made 1/2 turn R on LF during preceding beat.
Adopt R shadow Hold.

steps.action: Step to side with left foot while continuing to turn body to the right.
comments: Circle left hand clockwise over head over step 1 and 2.

steps.action: Transfer weight to right foot and turn body slightly to the left.
Close left foot to right foot in left side position while continuing to turn body to normal position.
comments: L hand to left side. Gradually lower to waist level.

steps.action: Step right foot back without turning.
comments: Continue to circle left hand clockwise over step 4 and 5. Incline body slightly left.

steps.action: Close right foot to left foot in closed position and take required hold.
Three forward walks circling man's back RLR ending in left side position.
steps.amount_of_turn: 1/2 turn to the right over steps 1-3
comments: Ends in LSP with 1/2 turn to R over step 1-3.

steps.action: Three forward walks circling man's back LRL ending in closed position.
comments: Alternative finishing positions include ending to side, diagonally forward in Open CPP, or adopting R shadow position.
